title: ambrosia × helenae
intro: Ambrosia × helenae, also known as the hybrid ragweed or giant ragweed, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is a natural hybrid of Ambrosia artemisiifolia and Ambrosia trifida. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ambrosia × helenae include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as allergies and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Ambrosia × helenae can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential allergic reactions.
